unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What would you tell a teenager from another country about school life in China?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：teen（十几岁）+ age（年龄）+ er（人）= 青少年。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 志愿者 & vi. 自愿
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I joined a volunteer club instead.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：volun（意愿）+ teer（人）-> 意愿做事的人，即志愿者。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Many students like to debate interesting topics with their classmates.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：de（加强）+ bate（打）-> 用言语打斗，即辩论。
词根词缀：pre（在前面）+ fer（带来，带去）-> 提到前面来，即更喜欢。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The school adviser helped me choose the suitable ones.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：suit（适合，西装）+ able（能够的）-> 适合的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Going from junior high school to senior high school is a really big challenge.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：车轮（chal-lenge谐音）挑战崎岖的山路。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Hi! My name is Adam and I'm a freshman at senior high school.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 组合词：fresh（新鲜的）+ man（人）-> 新手，一年级新生。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 难以理解的；不清楚的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The first week was a little confusing.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：con（共同）+ fus（灌，流）+ ing -> 全部灌倒在一起，令人困惑。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I know that Chinese is a very difficult language, but I hope to be fluent when I graduate.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：flu（流）+ ent -> 像水一样流出的，即流利的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vi. & vt. 毕业 & n. 毕业生
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My cousin Jim is a Tsinghua University graduate.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：grad（步，度）+ u + ate -> 走完学业的步子，毕业。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My adviser recommended that I should sign up for advanced literature.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：re（重新）+ commend（称赞）-> 再次称赞，即推荐。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My adviser recommended that I should sign up for advanced literature.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：ad（去）+ vance（前）+ ed -> 走在前面的，高级的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: vi. & vt. 停止；戒掉；离开
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Obviously, I was unhappy, but I won't quit.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：quit（放弃）与 quiet（安静）很像，放弃了就安静了。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I know I'll have to study harder as a senior high school student and get used to being responsible for a lot more.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：re（回）+ spons（承诺，响应）+ ible（能...的）-> 能回应承诺的，负责任的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 日程安排；工作计划 vt. 安排
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Finding time for both studies and extra-curricular activities is a big challenge, so I need to make a workable schedule.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：s (死) + che (车) + du (堵) + le (了) -> 死车堵了，需要重新安排日程。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 有瘾的；上瘾的；入迷的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Some students even become addicted to the Internet and cannot concentrate on school and family life.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 词根词缀：ad（去）+ dict（说，宣告）+ ed -> 听从某物的宣告，无法自拔，即上瘾的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I recommend that you talk to your friend about his behaviour.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 联想记忆：be (是) + have (拥有) + iour -> 拥有一定表现，就是行为。
